generated_oml:
instance LiDARSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "LiDAR sensor capturing raw point cloud data for object detection"
    DTDFVocab:producedData LiDARPointCloudRaw
]

instance LiDARPointCloudRaw : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom LiDARSensor
    base:desc "Raw point cloud data transmitted from LiDAR sensor"
]

instance ObjectTracksData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    DTDFVocab:fromData LiDARPointCloudRaw
    base:desc "Object tracks derived from LiDAR point cloud data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo PointCloudClusteringEnabler
]

instance VehicleStateData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Vehicle state information including speed, position, and orientation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance ProjectedPathData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Projected driving path data generated by ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo DataTranslationEnabler
]

instance PointCloudClusteringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Processes raw LiDAR data into object tracks using clustering algorithms"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService
]

instance DataTranslationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Handles data serialization, message type alignment, and unit conversions for all data streams"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataMonitoringService, ComputationOffloadingService, RemoteManagementService
]

instance CloudOffloadingEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC computations to cloud resources for execution"
    DTDFVocab:enables ComputationOffloadingService
]

instance RemoteManagementEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enables remote control of ACC system via operator commands"
    DTDFVocab:enables RemoteManagementService
]

instance DataMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state, projected driving path, and object tracks; view, save, and generate reports"
    DTDFVocab:provides DataVisualizationInsight, ReportGenerationInsight
]

instance ComputationOffloadingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Offloads ACC system computations (lead vehicle detection, speed calculation) to cloud resources; results sent back for actuation"
    DTDFVocab:provides LeadVehicleDetectionAction, SpeedCalculationAction
]

instance RemoteManagementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Enables operators to enable/disable ACC, set desired speed, and send emergency braking commands remotely"
    DTDFVocab:provides EnableACCAction, SetDesiredSpeedAction, EmergencyBrakingAction
]

instance DataVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of vehicle state and object tracks"
]

instance ReportGenerationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Ability to save and generate reports from system data"
]

instance LeadVehicleDetectionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Detects lead vehicle using offloaded computation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance SpeedCalculationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Computes speed based on distance to lead vehicle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance EnableACCAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote enable/disable of ACC system"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance SetDesiredSpeedAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Set desired speed for ACC from remote location"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance EmergencyBrakingAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Send emergency braking command remotely"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance UserEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "User-facing entity for monitoring and control"
    base:contains ThreeDVisualization, ControlPanel
]

instance DigitalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital twin entity responsible for data management and control"
    base:contains DataManagementComponent, ControlComponent
]

instance PhysicalTwinEntity : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Physical twin entity handling data pre-processing, actuation, and device communication"
    base:contains DataPreProcessingComponent, ActuationComponent, DeviceCommunicationComponent, PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent
]

instance ThreeDVisualization : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "3D visualization component for real-time vehicle state display"
]

instance ControlPanel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Control panel for remote management operations"
]

instance DataManagementComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages data storage and processing for the digital twin"
]

instance ControlComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles control logic and coordination between components"
]

instance DataPreProcessingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles data pre-processing including serialization and translation"
]

instance ActuationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Manages physical actuation based on control commands"
]

instance DeviceCommunicationComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Handles communication with physical devices via ROS2 and Wi-Fi UDP"
]

instance PointCloudClusteringTrackingComponent : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Software component for processing LiDAR point cloud data into object tracks"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Clock synchronization with 100 ms accuracy is required for device coordination during computation offloading in safety-critical vehicular applications, constrained by hardware limitations."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Architecture follows ISO 23247 RA, implementing Functional Entities as ROS2 packages containing ROS2 nodes; entities (User, Digital Twin, Physical Twin) are deployed on distinct hardware, with Physical Twin Entity hosting general automotive functionality like Point Cloud Clustering & Tracking."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Communication between software components occurs within a ROS2 network, while inter-entity communication occurs over a Wi-Fi network using UDP in the transport layer."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin system complies with ISO 23247, a standard for manufacturing comprising four parts: Overview and general principles, Reference architecture, Digital representation of physical manufacturing elements, and Information exchange. Part 2 defines an entity-based reference architecture with Observable Manufacturing Elements (OMEs), Data Collection and Device Control Entities, Digital Twin Entities, and User Entities. Functional Entities (FEs) within these entities handle tasks like actuation, data transformation, and user interfacing; however, the standard does not specify implementation details for FEs, with OPC Unified Architecture cited as an example for data collection and control."
]
